body: {"rationale":"Title is crisp and imperative. Description has PROBLEM with observed evidence, ROOT CAUSE with file:line into fizeau (service_execute.go:193-224), PROPOSED FIX logic, and NON-SCOPE. AC is numbered with named Test* functions (AC4, AC5) and a combined go test + lefthook gate (AC9). Labels cover phase/area/kind. Three issues reduce confidence in autonomous execution: (1) Dep field missing ddx-cfedee8e/ddx-9228a484 — the description explicitly names these as load-bearing prerequisites ('Without the ladder wiring, fizeau wouldn't have anything to route on even if this fix lands') but only ddx-ece97605 appears in the formal deps field; a sub-agent draining the queue could start this bead before the ladder is wired. (2) AC2 requires filing an upstream GitHub issue/PR against github.com/DocumentDrivenDX/fizeau, which is a human-only action; the bead's own executor cannot open external GitHub PRs autonomously, so this step will stall or be skipped silently. (3) AC1 instructs the agent to 'Read fizeau v0.10.3 source (cli/go.mod pin)' without specifying how to locate the module source — GOMODCACHE path, explicit clone step, or go mod download invocation; a cold agent must guess and may fail or read a wrong version.","score":5,"suggested_fixes":["Add ddx-cfedee8e (or its absorber ddx-9228a484) to the formal deps field — the description already states these are prerequisites for fizeau routing to have anything to act on; the formal deps field must reflect that or the queue will dispatch this bead prematurely.","Rewrite AC2: replace 'file an issue/PR against github.com/DocumentDrivenDX/fizeau' with 'prepare the upstream fix as a patch file at .ddx/executions/\u003crun-id\u003e/fizeau-routing-fix.patch and draft a PR description at .ddx/executions/\u003crun-id\u003e/upstream-pr-draft.md; a human operator submits the PR.' The bead executor cannot open external GitHub PRs.","Add an explicit source-location step to AC1: 'Locate fizeau source via $(go env GOMODCACHE)/github.com/!document!driven!d!x/fizeau@\u003cversion-from-go.mod\u003e (run go mod download first if the directory is absent); record the resolved path in the investigation report alongside file:line citations.'"],"waivers_applied":[]}

error: failed to push some refs to 'https://github.com/DocumentDrivenDX/ddx': exit status 1","malformed":true,"rationale":"Pre-push hook blocked on 7 failing tests in internal/server. Six are 'worker did not finish in time' timing failures that could be environment load or a behavioral slowdown introduced by the fizeau v0.10.15 bump changing execution flow latency. The seventh — TestWorkerManagerStopCancelsAgentExecution ('executor never entered the blocking Chat call') — is a functional assertion failure, not a timeout: the mock executor is expected to enter a Chat call but never does. This pattern is consistent with the fizeau routing change altering when or whether the service execute path reaches the Chat stub in tests.
